## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- Approved issue or decision:
- Included:
- Explicitly excluded:

## User or developer impact

Describe observable behavior, compatibility effects, or development-workflow changes.

## Validation

- [ ] Formatting
- [ ] Linting
- [ ] Type checking
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] macOS build/test, if applicable
- [ ] Windows build/test, if applicable
- [ ] Documentation reviewed

List commands, environments, and any skipped checks.

## Compatibility and safety

- [ ] JL Mixing Automation behavior and metadata compatibility are preserved, or the approved change is documented.
- [ ] Filesystem and process boundaries were reviewed.
- [ ] No paid-only dependency or service was added without approval.
- [ ] Dependency licenses are compatible.
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included.

## Follow-up work

List known limitations or deferred work.
